dialogos.texto_en: Do you want anything? Are you hungry?
I'm okay now. I had a light meal earlier.
If you want something to drink, just let me know.\nIt's important to stay hydrated during times like this.
Thank you.
Oh, sorry.\nI shouldn't have talked to you so much.\nYou won't be able to sleep.
No, it's okay.\nSorry, Futaro-kun.\nWe came all this way to Okinawa and I'm like this.
Don't worry about it.\nI'm doing this because I want to.
Because we're dating?
...Y-yeah, that's it.
Teehee... When you said we're lovers earlier,\nI was surprised.
Why? Because it's not like me?
Umm, it's a little different.\nIt's like...a happy feeling...
Sorry, I don't know how to explain it.\nIt's like something in my heart burst\nand I can't put it into words.
This is the first time I've felt this way.
But, I shouldn't be happy in this situation.\nI wasn't able to take care of myself.
You're so nice.
This much is natural.
...Even though it would've been best\nif I could have taken care of myself better.
There's no point worrying\nabout what's already happened.
But, I still need to reflect upon my mistakes.
The climate here is different so it takes time \nfor our bodies to adjust. I should've consider that.
I was already in an unfamiliar environment,\nand being in the same room as you\nmade me even more excited%p-2;――
I messed up my usual routine\nand forced myself to wake up early.\nThat wasn't good for me.
Is that so?
Yesterday, everyone said I was acting strange,\nbut I probably WAS acting really strange, wasn't I?
I was constantly feeling flustered\nand could only see you.
In hindsight,\nI think I started feeling unwell quite early on.
(No doubt, Ichika yesterday\n seemed to be completely lost in feverish delirium.\n I never thought it would be literal.)
So...not just today,\nbut I caused a lot of trouble yesterday too.
No, I don't think you were troublesome at all\nyesterday or today.
But I still need to reflect on it.\nIf I had realized earlier,\nI could have stopped before things got this bad.
Jeez, you're surprisingly hard on yourself.\nBut I think it's good\nthat you're able to analyze things like this.
...Even if I can do it now, it's too late.
Ugh, I'm really pathetic.\nIt makes me want to cry.
Getting sick is something that can happen to anyone.\nBesides, since you're able to analyze it,\nyou won't make the same mistake again, right?
Mm...\nThank you.\nYou're really kind.
Am I?\nI'm just...normal.
Hey, you could have gone with everyone else,\nyou know?
I'm happy that you're willing to take care of me,\nbut it's not like I can't move%p-2;――
Hey, are you dumb or something?
Whaaat? Why would you say that?
You can't just leave someone you care about\nsuffering like this.
So, let me stay by your side until you feel better.
Sure...
(Having said that, all I can do is just be by her side...\n Isn't there anything else I can do%p-2;――%p;?)
(Oh, I have an idea.)
Ichika, could you reach out from under the covers?
Huh? Like this?
Huh?
Your hand is surprisingly small.
Wh-what's this?\nWhy are you holding my hand\nall of a sudden?
It's a charm to help you get better, right?
Ah!\nWhat Mom used to do...?
I remembered what Yotsuba said.\nWhen you were sick, your mom used to do this for you.
Futaro-kun, your hand is warm.
...Do you mind?
Why would I mind? If you keep holding my hand like this,\nI'll probably get better soon.\nCan you...keep doing this?
Yeah, of course.
...Ever since I was young, whenever I got sick,\none of my sisters would do this for me.
But now, you're doing the same thing.\nI'm happy about that...
I won't hand over this role to anyone else.\nI'm the one who will be by your side, Ichika.
...Stooop.\nI think...my fever is starting to rise.
...To tell you the truth, mine too.
But if you can come to take care of me anytime,\nit wouldn't mind getting sick again.
Please spare me.\nEvery time you get sick,\nI really worry about you.
Ahaha, just kidding.\nI'll be careful from now on.
Please do.
And make sure you gradually improve your lifestyle\nhabits. Since you usually live such a lazy lifestyle,\nit's impossible to suddenly start doing things properly.
So then, until I can break out of my lazy habits,\nplease take care of me.
Hey...\nI didn't say I'd take care of you THAT much.
Aw, is that so?
Okay, I understand.\nI'll try to improve little by little on things I'm not used to\nand take care of my health.
Yeah, I'm glad you understand.
(Wait, did what I just said apply to me too? Now that\n I think about it, we both planned to kiss during this\n trip, even though it's something we're not used to.)
Whew, I feel a lot better after a quick nap.\nI think I can get up now.
Don't get too ahead of yourself.\nStay in bed.
Okay.
Oh? A message from Itsuki-chan.
What is it?
Umm, they arrived safely at Okinawa World\nand are enjoying themselves.
They even sent us pictures.\nLook, like this one here.
Is that a picture from the Acer show?\nIt's a bit blurry\nbecause they can't keep up with the movement.
Oh, this one is really nice.\nIt's a picture of a limestone cave.
Let me see... Oooh, it's so moody.
I'll reply and say my thanks.
Hmm? Now there's one from Yotsuba.
What's this... Some kind of flower?\nDo you know, Futaro-kun?
I don't.\nThere's a fruit orchard over there,\nso maybe it's a fruit blossom?
Let's ask everyone when they get back.
Next is Nino's message.\nI wonder what kind of picture it is.
Ah.
Take this opportunity to rely on Fu-kun, she says.\nThat Nino...
Ahaha...\nEven if Nino didn't say it,\nI'm already knew I'm relying on you enough.
Now it's Miku's turn.
As soon as they found out\nyou were looking at your phone,\npictures kept coming one after another.
I think she's trying to make sure I don't get bored.
And...fun things come in groups of five, huh.
I see.
Ichika?
Everyone really is so kind...\nLike this, they give me joy I can't split into\nfive equal parts... And yet, everyone...
I'm so glad to have everyone as my sisters.\nI'm so glad that everyone is here for me.
Ah, you're right.
Everyone is here for me,\nand you're here by my side...\nThis...makes me scared for some reason...
Ichika, there's no need to be afraid.
Huh...?
I told you before.\nThat I'll become able to heal your anxieties.
I'm happy right now,\nbeing able to be by your side like this, Ichika.
Yeah... Yeah!\nFutaro-kun... Thank you...
